tasks.description: Fix LayoutMainContent.tsx: Remove the `isVideoEditorShellActive ? '0px'` override on line 41, changing paddingBottom from `isVideoEditorShellActive ? '0px' : (isMobileSplitView ? '0px' : ...)` to just `isMobileSplitView ? '0px' : ((isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen) ? \`${effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight}px\` : '0px')`. Also add `transition-[padding] duration-300 ease-smooth` to the video editor shell branch on line 65-66, making it `'h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden transition-[padding] duration-300 ease-smooth'`.
tasks.executor_notes: Removed the `isVideoEditorShellActive ? '0px'` paddingBottom override so the video editor shell now uses the existing `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` path for bottom compression. Kept the marginLeft, marginRight, and paddingTop video-editor overrides unchanged, and added `transition-[padding] duration-300 ease-smooth` to the video editor shell container.

tasks.description: Fix VideoEditorPage.tsx line 292: Change `h-screen w-screen` to `h-full w-full` on the root div so it respects parent padding constraints instead of using absolute viewport dimensions.
tasks.executor_notes: Changed the `VideoEditorPage` root container from `h-screen w-screen` to `h-full w-full` so it respects the parent shell's padding-based bottom offset instead of measuring against the viewport. Verified by inspection that the parent video-editor shell main remains `h-full w-full overflow-hidden`, so fill behavior is preserved when no bottom pane offset is applied.

tasks.description: Add two regression tests to LayoutMainContent.test.tsx: (1) When isVideoEditorShellActive=true AND isGenerationsPaneLocked=true, assert paddingBottom equals '180px' (effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight). (2) When isVideoEditorShellActive=true AND isGenerationsPaneLocked=false AND isGenerationsPaneOpen=false, assert paddingBottom equals '0px'. Use the existing mock infrastructure (useVideoEditorRouteStateMock, usePanesMock, defaultPanesState).
tasks.executor_notes: Added two regression tests for the video editor shell path in `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`: one asserts `paddingBottom: '180px'` when `isVideoEditorShellActive` and `isGenerationsPaneLocked` are true, and one asserts `paddingBottom: '0px'` when the generations pane is neither locked nor open. Verified by inspection that both tests reuse `defaultPanesState`, set `useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue({ isEditorRoute: true, isVideoEditorShellActive: true })`, and read styles from `container.querySelector('.content-container')`.

tasks.description: Run test suites: (1) `npx vitest run src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` — must pass all tests including new ones. (2) `npx vitest run src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` — regression check. (3) `npx vitest run src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts` — regression check (note: plan references a wrong path, use the one from git status).

watch_items: CSS box model assumption: paddingBottom on an h-screen overflow-hidden container must reduce the content area that h-full children measure against. If it doesn't (e.g., box-sizing issue), may need to switch to a height style instead of padding — but keep changes within LayoutMainContent only.

The video editor loading/error states (lines ~260-288 in VideoEditorPage.tsx) still use h-screen. This is a known minor gap (flag: video-editor-loading-states-unchanged) — acceptable for now since those are transient states.

The plan says to also zero margins (marginRight, marginLeft, paddingTop) for the video editor shell — those overrides on lines 38-40 are NOT being changed. Only paddingBottom (line 41) is being modified. Do not accidentally remove the other overrides.
effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight is the only correct height value to use. Never substitute raw generationsPaneHeight — they differ on constrained viewports.
The test file (LayoutMainContent.test.tsx) already has a defaultPanesState with effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight: 180. New tests should use this value in assertions.
The useBottomOffset test path in the plan (src/shared/hooks/layout/useBottomOffset.test.ts) differs from git status (src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts). Use the path from git status.

sense_checks.question: After removing the isVideoEditorShellActive override, does the paddingBottom expression still correctly produce '0px' when no pane is locked/open (i.e., the isMobileSplitView and fallback branches are intact)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. After the change, `paddingBottom` is `isMobileSplitView ? '0px' : ((isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen) ? `${effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight}px` : '0px')`, so it still resolves to `'0px'` when the bottom pane is neither locked nor open.

sense_checks.question: After changing h-screen w-screen to h-full w-full on the VideoEditorPage root div, does the editor still fill the available space correctly when the generations pane is NOT locked (i.e., parent main is h-full w-full overflow-hidden with no paddingBottom)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. With the root changed to `h-full w-full`, the page now sizes to the parent `main` container, which is already `h-full w-full overflow-hidden` in video editor mode. When no generations pane padding is applied, the editor still fills the available space correctly.

sense_checks.question: Do both new tests use the existing mock pattern (useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue with isVideoEditorShellActive: true) and query via container.querySelector('.content-container')?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. Both new tests use the existing `useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue({ isEditorRoute: true, isVideoEditorShellActive: true })` pattern and query the wrapper with `container.querySelector('.content-container')` before asserting `paddingBottom`.

sense_checks.question: Do all three test suites pass with zero failures, including the pre-existing tests that assert non-video-editor behavior?
sense_checks.executor_note: No. Under the repo's configured Vitest runner, `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts` passed, but `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` failed 1 test and `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` failed 3 tests, so all three suites did not pass with zero failures.

meta_commentary:
This is a two-line production fix plus two regression tests. The core insight: LayoutMainContent already has a centralized paddingBottom offset path using effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight — the video editor shell was just bypassing it with an explicit '0px' override. The second line (h-screen → h-full in VideoEditorPage) is required because h-screen ignores parent padding.

Execution order: T1 and T2 are independent and can be done in parallel. T3 depends on T1 (needs the new behavior to write correct assertions). T4 is the verification gate.

Key gotcha: Lines 38-40 in LayoutMainContent.tsx also have `isVideoEditorShellActive ? '0px'` overrides for marginRight, marginLeft, and paddingTop — those are CORRECT and must NOT be removed. Only line 41 (paddingBottom) changes. The side panes and top editor pane should NOT affect the video editor shell layout.

The transition class addition on line 65-66 is cosmetic but important for UX — without it, the padding change will snap instead of animating smoothly.
